branch.branch_summary: After v9.4.1, advance v9.5 incident recovery evidence, v9.6 provider execution cost/quota boundary, v9.7 third-party operator validation, and v9.8 production execution go/no-go evidence candidate.

tree_answer.where_are_we: The runtime is between v9.4 and the next concrete branch.
tree_answer.why_this_branch: Ship v9.4 Provider-backed Controlled Execution Candidate: bind provider approval, target, reproduction, rollback, outcome, learning, operator acceptance, product value, and production boundary evidence into one operator go/no-go candidate without authorizing production execution.
tree_answer.what_branch_comes_next: Open an implementation task for the current frontier: After v9.4.1, advance v9.5 incident recovery evidence, v9.6 provider execution cost/quota boundary, v9.7 third-party operator validation, and v9.8 production execution go/no-go evidence candidate.
